titleStmt.title: SII 11.196: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 196. (B.K. No. 42 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE VĪRABHADRA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 45, Śārvari, Māgha, Kāmanamāvāsye, corresponding to A.D. 1121, February 19, Saturday (not verifiable). It registers gifts of gold for various charities made by Nāṇimayya Nāyaka for the merit of his father Tīkimayya Nāyaka and his mother Rannikabbe. The village Lokkiguṇḍi and the Thousand Mahājanas of that place are praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁ bhavē .
namastasmai varāhāya līlayācaratē mahīṁ khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ kaṇakaṇā yatē
© śrīge vibhūtige dharmma kkāgara menaliṁdra naggadamarāvatigaṁ bhōgāvatigaṁ sale
mēlāgirppudu dharege lokkiguṁḍi grāma . vṛtta . doreya rssāsirvva ratyūrjjita vima
ḷayaśaśrīge peṁpiṁge lakṣmīkaraśauṁdaryyakke dhairyya kkatiśayataraśauryyakke nānārtthi
śiṣṭōtkaraśaṁtuṣṭi pradāna kkanupamitavivēkakke satyakke śaucācaraṇa kkāścaryyagaṁbhī
ratege pariki salkanyasāmānya martyaru . © haricaraṇāmbhōruhaṣaṭcaraṇaṁ bāndhava
janaykeratnābharaṇaṁ karageyara tīkimayyaṁ puruṣāgraṇi yenisidaṁ samastā
vaniyoḷ . Ene permmege tāna tavarmmaneyenisida tīkimayyanāyakana ku
lāṁgane rannikabbe vanitājanadoḷu patibhakteyenisi peṁpaṁ paḍedaḷu . Ava rgudbhava mo
davira kēśavadēvapadābjamadhukaraṁ puṇyaṁ pallavisire nārāyaṇa nudbavisida nabhimāna
meṁdaraṁ guṇaniḷayaṁ . gele nerapi datuḷapuṇyade baladiṁ nārāyaṇāṁghribhaktiya
baladiṁ sale lōkadoḷu suputraḥ kuladīpaka nenisi nāṇimayyaṁ negaḻda .
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 45 neya sārvvarīsaṁvatsarada māghamāsa
da kāmanamāvāsye puṇyadinadaṁdu śrīnāṇimayyanāyakaṁ tammayyaṁ tīki
mayyanāyaka rggakṣayavāgi māḷeyagēriya Aṟavaṁṭagege biṭṭa gadyāṇa 5
Ī ponna vṛddhiyalu mūṟu tiṁgaḷu naḍasuvaru . © mattaṁ ravi kāḷigeṟeya pa
ḍuvaṇa meyya tanna Āraveyalliya Aṟavaṁṭagege tamma Abbe rannikavvege Akṣaya
vāgi biṭṭa gadyāṇa 5 Ī ponna vṛdhdhiyalu mūṟu tiṁgaḷu naḍasuvaru . © mattaṁ kande
rppanāladiṁ teṁkaṇa meyya kaṁmalayanāyakara satradoḷagaṇa tammayyaṁ tīkima
yyanāyakaṁgaṁ tammabbe rannikabbegaṁ Akṣayavāgi tānagaḷisida keṟege biṭṭa gadyāṇa 5
Ī ponna vṛddhiyalu keṟeya baṁḍaṁ kaḷasuvaru . mattaṁ vummacigeya dāriya haridē
vana keṟeya baḍagaṇa meyya kappacara satadoḷagaṇa tanna rēvattarkkeyoḷage tannaga
ḷisida hokkaraṇege biṭṭa gadyāṇa 10 Ī ponna vṛddhiyalu hokkaraṇeya baṇḍaṁ kaḷasu
varu . mattavā hokkaraṇeyelli yaṟavaṁṭagege hatu mānasaraṁbaliya nuṇbaṁtā
ge biṭṭa gadyāṇa 10 Ī ponna vṛddhiyalu mūṟu tiṁgaḷaṁbaliva naṟavaṁṭagevaṁ naḍasuvar .
© mattaṁ kappacara maṭhada bhōjanakke tammayyaṁ tīkimayyanāyakangeyuṁ tammabbe
rannikabbegaṁ Akṣayavāgi Ā maṭhadalliya sāsanadalū biṭṭa gadyāṇa 5 © mattaṁ kappa
cara maṭhade bhōjanakke tanage Akṣayavāgi Ā maṭhada sāsanadalu biṭṭa gadyāṇa 5
mattaṁ Ā maṭheda purāṇamaṁ kēḷva mahājanakke tammayyaṁ tīkimayyanāyakaṁ
geyuṁ tammabbe rannikabbegaṁ tanagaṁ Akṣayavāgi Alliya sāsanadalu gandhakke biṭṭa ga
dyāṇa 2 © mattaṁ kappa cara dēvara muṁdaṇa tanna niṟisida mūṟu dhvajakke tammayya tī
kimayya nāyakaṁgeyuṁ tammabbe rannikabbegeyuṁ tanageyuṁ Akṣayavāgi Alli
ya dēvara sāsanadalu biṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 . Īponna vṛddhiyalu Ī dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ naḍasuvar .
© mattaṁ gaṁggara hariharadēvara nandādīvigege tammayyaṁ tīkimayya nāyakaṁgeyuṁ
tammabbe rannikabbegaṁ tana[gaṁ Akṣayavāgi] dēvaralliya sāsanadalu biṭṭa gadyāṇa 5
naḍasihiveṁdu naḍalollade lōbhadi tinda
ḍesuvaru vaṁśadavaruṁ bandhugaḷuṁ śrīsā
sūryyagrahaṇa byatīpāta saṁkra
vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇa
sahasrāṇiThe stone is
Digital edition of SII 11.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
